name: Qiuyuan
description: Former senior agent of Mingting's Internal Security Agency, he is a swordsman of cool resilience and absolute integrity, wandering Huanglong alone and seeks not fame nor high office, but mastery of swordsmanship and a life guided by high morals. He was framed by the Grand Architect for the murder of his master, and is now a fugitive throughout all of Huanglong.
